positive: A whimsical, retro-futuristic cityscape viewed from above, depicted using bold, simplified graphic silhouettes. The composition should be centrally focused, featuring stylized skyscrapers and fantastical transport lines intersecting a clean, stylized sunburst in the background. The color palette is restricted to deep indigo, electric teal, vibrant orange, and mustard yellow, giving it a pop-art, mid-century modern feel. Use flat graphic design elements, strong black outlines, and high contrast. The overall aesthetic should be highly detailed yet readable when scaled down for apparel printing. Style: Clean vector art illustration, pop art, screen print style, minimalist graphic novel.
